name: IdsEdwCmnPrctBrdCrtfDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE_BASE AS (SELECT CPBC.CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SK, CPBC.CMN_PRCT_ID, CPBC.BRD_CRTF_SEQ_NO, CPBC.CMN_PRCT_SK, CPBC.BRD_CRTF_DT_SK, CPBC.BRD_CRTF_DESC, CPBC.BRD_CRTF_DIR_DESC, CPBC.BRD_CRTF_EXPRTN_DT_SK, CPBC.BRD_CRTF_STTUS_DESC, CPBC.BRD_RECRTF_DT_SK, COALESCE(CM.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF CPBC LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON CPBC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CM.CD_MPPNG_SK), CTE_STAGE AS (SELECT CAST(CTE_BASE.CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SK AS INT) AS CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(CTE_BASE.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE CTE_BASE.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, CTE_BASE.CMN_PRCT_ID AS CMN_PRCT_ID, CAST(CTE_BASE.BRD_CRTF_SEQ_NO AS INT) AS CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAST(CTE_BASE.CMN_PRCT_SK AS INT) AS CMN_PRCT_SK, CTE_BASE.BRD_CRTF_DT_SK AS BRD_CRTF_DT_SK, CTE_BASE.BRD_CRTF_DESC AS BRD_CRTF_DESC, CTE_BASE.BRD_CRTF_DIR_DESC AS BRD_CRTF_DIR_DESC, CTE_BASE.BRD_CRTF_EXPRTN_DT_SK AS BRD_CRTF_EXPRTN_DT_SK, CTE_BASE.BRD_CRTF_STTUS_DESC AS BRD_CRTF_STTUS_DESC, CTE_BASE.BRD_RECRTF_DT_SK AS BRD_RECRTF_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM CTE_BASE) SELECT CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, CMN_PRCT_ID, CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SEQ_NO, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CMN_PRCT_SK, BRD_CRTF_DT_SK, BRD_CRTF_DESC, BRD_CRTF_DIR_DESC, BRD_CRTF_EXPRTN_DT_SK, BRD_CRTF_STTUS_DESC, BRD_RECRTF_DT_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM CTE_STAGE

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwCmnPrctBrdCrtfDExtr
Read all the Data from IDS CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
Write CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvCmnPrctBrdCrtfDLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
